mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drama
WHERE status = 1
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
AND
WHERE
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT drama_id FROM drama_actor WHERE actor_id IN ( SELECT id FROM actor WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drama ( name, cover, intro, category_id, status, view_count, publish_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{cover}, #{intro}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{publishDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE drama SET name = #{name}, cover = #{cover}, intro = #{intro}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drama SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT dc.name as category, COUNT(*) as count FROM drama d JOIN drama_category dc ON d.category_id = dc.id GROUP BY dc.id, dc.name
SELECT id, name, view_count as viewCount, like_count as likeCount FROM drama ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 10
